visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with styled brown hair, wearing a navy blue oversized t-shirt and white trousers, walks into a brightly lit, modern living room. He looks directly at the camera with a serious expression and points his finger. Behind him, a woman in a blue and white striped shirt is sitting on a large white sectional sofa, looking at her smartphone. The room has minimalist white walls and light wood flooring. (2) The scene cuts to the man leaning over a wooden dining table, wiping it vigorously with a light green cloth. He is looking down at the table and then up at the camera. (3) The man is back in the living room, standing near the woman who is still on the sofa. He gestures with his hands while speaking. Yellow and white text overlays appear on the screen. (4) A quick montage shows the man and woman interacting: they look at a pile of folded clothes on a table, the man opens a white refrigerator door, and then he hands her a small green package. (5) The man enters the room excitedly, carrying a large blue and white patterned shopping bag filled with vegetables. He presents it to the woman who is now lying on the sofa looking bored. (6) In the kitchen, the man is seen washing a white bowl in a black sink. Then, in the living room, he uses a handheld vacuum cleaner to clean the floor near the woman's feet while she eats snacks from a wooden tray. (7) The woman is sitting at a table, looking hot and fanning herself with a paper fan. The man appears behind her and then brings in a white pedestal fan. (8) Close-up shots of the white fan follow, showing the 'DIKE' logo, the touch control panel with digital numbers, and the dual-layer fan blades. (9) The man is shown outdoors in a park-like setting with green trees in the background. He is sitting in a folding chair next to the fan, which is mounted on a tripod. He looks relaxed and happy. (10) Back indoors, the man demonstrates how to disassemble the fan. He pulls the pole apart and neatly places the base, fan head, and poles into a colorful patterned tote bag. (11) The man and woman are together again in the living room with the fan. The man playfully holds up a circular fan with a celebrity's face on it, and they both smile at the camera.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 大家都在說. [Variety]: 小朋友要富養. (2) [Variety]: NO. [Subtitle]: 聽嘎哥的一句勸. (3) [Subtitle]: 全家最需要富養的是誰？ [Variety]: 老婆. (4) [Subtitle]: 老婆是整個家裡的靈魂啊. [Slogan]: HAPPY WIFE HAPPY LIFE. (5) [Subtitle]: 老婆是交來疼的. [Variety]: ???. [Subtitle]: 不是交來罵的. (6) [Subtitle]: 朱子治家格言. (7) [Subtitle]: 領妻成道. [Subtitle]: 就能助夫成德. (8) [Subtitle]: 聽婦言. [Subtitle]: 乖骨肉. (9) [Subtitle]: 就是說讓老婆爽. [Subtitle]: 是當丈夫基本的責任. (10) [Subtitle]: 雖然你做事向來十拿九穩. [Subtitle]: 但差的那一 “吻”. (11) [Subtitle]: 是不是就是. [Subtitle]: 老婆的深情一 “吻”. (12) [Variety]: ⚠️ 聽好了 ⚠️. [Subtitle]: 老婆不想碰水. (13) [Subtitle]: 就幫她洗碗. [Subtitle]: 老婆嫌髒. (14) [Subtitle]: 就幫她打掃. [Subtitle]: 那如果老婆覺得熱. (15) [Subtitle]: 怎麼辦呢? [Subtitle]: 來. (16) [Subtitle]: 就幫她準備這一台. [Logo]: DIKE. (17) [Slogan]: 全能無線風扇. [Slogan]: 隨身吹、隨時涼. (18) [Slogan]: 有線/無線. [Slogan]: 兩用設計. (19) [Slogan]: 約2小時快速充飽電. (20) [Slogan]: 最長可享. [Slogan]: 22.5小時涼風. (21) [Slogan]: 台地兩用. [Slogan]: 獨家專利. (22) [Slogan]: 雙層9+11離心扇葉. (23) [Slogan]: 風感集中柔和. [Slogan]: 最大柔風距. (24) [Slogan]: 可到11公尺. [Subtitle]: 搭載高效能無刷馬達. (25) [Subtitle]: 耐用又安靜. [Slogan]: 最低噪音. (26) [Slogan]: 只有28dB. (27) [Variety]: 1拆. (28) [Variety]: 2疊. (29) [Variety]: 3收納. [Slogan]: 完整收納只有13公分. (30) [Slogan]: 輕巧方便攜帶. (31) [Subtitle]: 不管是居家、戶外露營、野餐. (32) [Subtitle]: 通通不受電線拘束. [Slogan]: 想吹哪就吹哪. (33) [Subtitle]: 先生的風度. [Subtitle]: 決定太太的溫度. (34) [Slogan]: 觸控面板+遙控挺方便. [Subtitle]: 想要有多少溫度跟風度. (35) [Subtitle]: 隨便你調. [Slogan]: 嘎哥團購優惠中. (36) [Slogan]: 今年夏天. [Slogan]: 最涼神隊友. [Variety]: 今年夏天. [Variety]: 最派神隊友. (37) [Logo]: DIKE. [Slogan]: 全能無線風扇.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 main female companion.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The man has dyed brown, styled hair and wears a navy blue t-shirt and white pants. The woman has long dark hair and wears a blue and white striped t-shirt and dark denim jeans.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The indoor scenes are set in a clean, modern apartment with white furniture, wooden accents, and a large window with sheer curtains. The outdoor scenes feature a lush green park with trees and a wooden fence.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy male narrator speaking Mandarin with a bright, enthusiastic tone. An upbeat electronic pop BGM with a steady 4/4 beat is mixed underneath. A sharp 'whoosh' SFX punctuates the transition between the introductory phrases. (2) As the narrator lists household chores, short, metallic 'impact' sound effects or percussive hits emphasize the visual cuts. The narrator's speech rate is fast and rhythmic, matching the BGM's tempo. (3) A digital 'ding' sound effect marks the introduction of the product name. The BGM continues smoothly, providing a consistent energetic bed. The narrator transitions into a more descriptive, informative tone but maintains high arousal. (4) During the feature demonstration, various UI-like 'clicks' and 'pops' are used to highlight specific features mentioned. The acoustic texture is clean with high spectral brightness. (5) In the outdoor sequence, a faint natural wind noise floor is briefly audible, but the voice-over remains the dominant signal. The BGM swells slightly in volume during transitions. (6) The final phase features a humorous closing remark with a playful vocal inflection, followed by a final musical stinger and a digital chime as the brand logo is presented.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Relatable Sketch -> Product Integration -> Feature Breakdown -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the DIKE wireless fan through a humorous and relatable short-form video. The creator uses the concept of 'cherishing one's wife' to justify the purchase, highlighting the fan's portability, battery life, and ease of storage as solutions to keeping a partner comfortable.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct presentation of the product, detailed feature walkthrough, presence of brand logo, and mention of a group buy discount.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video follows a classic social media influencer marketing formula, combining high-energy comedy with practical product benefits to drive engagement and sales.
